judgments.reason: Unit declares an async lifecycle method and awaits player init, audio manager setup, and auto-start before continuing.
Owner-qualified aboutToAppear on the Index custom component/router page implements the ArkUI lifecycle hook.
Unit emits multiple Log.info diagnostic records for lifecycle, interrupt, progress, duration, and size events.
Unit initializes AV player, configures video type, handles playback events, pauses on interrupt, and updates AV session playback state and metadata.
Unit registers platform AVPlayer event listeners for interrupt, time, duration, and video size updates.
Method is async and awaits player init, audio manager setup, and auto-start before continuing.
Resolved Index component/page method implements aboutToAppear lifecycle initialization.
Unit emits multiple diagnostic Log.info records during appear and player event handling.
Initializes AV player for video, wires playback events, pauses on interrupt, and updates session metadata/progress.
Registers continuous platform AVPlayer listeners for interrupt, time, duration, and video size events.
Owner-qualified aboutToDisappear lifecycle method on an ArkUI custom component/router page.
Emits diagnostic records through the platform Log facility during cleanup.
Stops casting, destroys the media session, and releases the AV player during teardown.
Unregisters and clears a platform network connection listener.
Removes controller/cast event listeners and unregisters a platform network subscription.
Clears previously scheduled runtime timer tasks during component teardown.
Unit consumes Promise results from getAllNets via then handlers and continues control flow in those callbacks.
Unit emits diagnostic records through Log.info and Log.error for network listener setup and events.
Unit creates a platform net connection, queries all nets, and listens for network availability and loss events.
Unit registers platform net-connection error and event listeners via register and on for netAvailable and netLost.
Unit consumes a Promise via getAllNets().then and continues control flow in the fulfillment callback.
Unit emits platform diagnostic logs through Log.info and Log.error for network lifecycle and error paths.
Unit creates a platform NetConnection, queries active nets, and listens for network available and lost events.
Unit registers platform NetConnection listeners via register and on for continuous network state events.
Unit cancels a stored delayed callback by calling clearTimeout and clearing the timer field.
Cancels a stored timeout handle and invokes a helper that clears another runtime timer
Unit controls a media AV player by unregistering its media playback event listeners.
Unit cancels continuous platform media-player event subscriptions via off().
Unit consumes a Promise from getAllNets via then/catch and continues control flow on resolve or reject.
Unit emits an error-level diagnostic through the Log facility on network recovery failure.
Unit queries platform network connections via connection.getAllNets and updates connectivity state from the result.
Unit clears any prior retry timer then schedules a delayed setTimeout callback using networkRetryDelayMs.
Unit emits a platform diagnostic log via Log.info with a timeUpdate message.
Unit builds AVPlaybackState with elapsed position and applies it through the AV session API.
Creates a Slider control and binds onChange and onTouch handlers for user-driven interaction.
Emits diagnostic Log.info records for slider value changes, playback position params, and touch events.
Seeks local avPlayer, updates AV session playback state, and sends cast seek control for media position.
Schedules a delayed setTimeout callback and clears the timer on further touch activity.
Creates a Slider control and binds onChange plus onTouch handlers for user-driven value and touch interaction.
Emits diagnostic Log.info records for slider value changes, playback state params, and touch events.
Seeks the local AV player, updates AV session playback position, and sends a cast seek control command.
Schedules a delayed setTimeout callback and clears prior sliderTimer timeouts on touch up or continue.
